Current Position: Homepage > Research Think Tank > Think Tank Expert > Qiji Ma  

# Qiji Ma  

From 1992 to 1994, one of the founding participants of Horizon Research Group, working as Deputy General Manager and Chief Research Officer;  

From 1994 to 2000, established Panorama Social- Economic research Co. as Founder,

text_blocks.text_content: Translation
Qiji Ma - Think Tank Expert - Marketing Research Association
working as President and Chief Researcher;
From 2000 to 2003, Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of ChinaLabs;
From 2003 to 2006, Deputy General Manager of Sinomonitor;

From 2006 to 2010, Senior Vice President of Nielsen China online, leading product development and research team of China's Internet media and network applications, and committed to promoting the establishment and value realization of evaluation systems of China's Internet marketing and advertising, e- commerce and concerned markets.

From 2010 to 2014, Co- Founder, Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Couneet International, focusing on providing technical innovation and data services for traditional commercial retail;
One of the earliest practitioners of market research in mainland China and one of the first registered consultants in China.
Main research areas: Research in marketing and consumption, research in media, research in advertising and marketing, and analysis and consultation of commercial market
Member of Information Society 50 Forum
Member of Chinese Cross- border E- commerce 50 Forum
China Advertising Think Tank Expert
Researcher of China National Institute of Advertising
Researcher of Research Center of Internet Marketing Communication, Peking University
Expert of Internet Research Center, Internet Society of China
Member of Academic Committee of Alibaba Research Institute
Researcher of Pangool Smart City Research Center
Director and Vice Chairman of Digital Marketing Research Center of China Advertising Association of Commerce
Vice Chairman of China Commerce Association for General Merchandise E- commerce Committee, and Chairman of O2O Alliance
Deputy Secretary General of Network Marketing Working Committee, Internet Society

Translation  

Qiji Ma - Think Tank Expert - Marketing Research Association  

working as President and Chief Researcher;  

From 2000 to 2003, Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of ChinaLabs;  

From 2003 to 2006, Deputy General Manager of Sinomonitor;  

From 2006 to 2010, Senior Vice President of Nielsen China online, leading product development and research team of China's Internet media and network applications, and committed to promoting the establishment and value realization of evaluation systems of China's Internet marketing and advertising, e- commerce and concerned markets.  

From 2010 to 2014, Co- Founder, Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Couneet International, focusing on providing technical innovation and data services for traditional commercial retail;  

One of the earliest practitioners of market research in mainland China and one of the first registered consultants in China.  

Main research areas: Research in marketing and consumption, research in media, research in advertising and marketing, and analysis and consultation of commercial market  

Member of Information Society 50 Forum  

Member of Chinese Cross- border E- commerce 50 Forum  

China Advertising Think Tank Expert  

Researcher of China National Institute of Advertising  

Researcher of Research Center of Internet Marketing Communication, Peking University  

Expert of Internet Research Center, Internet Society of China  

Member of Academic Committee of Alibaba Research Institute  

Researcher of Pangool Smart City Research Center  

Director and Vice Chairman of Digital Marketing Research Center of China Advertising Association of Commerce  

Vice Chairman of China Commerce Association for General Merchandise E- commerce Committee, and Chairman of O2O Alliance  

Deputy Secretary General of Network Marketing Working Committee, Internet Society

text_blocks.text_content: Translation
Qiji Ma - Think Tank Expert - Marketing Research Association
of China
Consultant of China Market Information Survey Association

Serving as a consultant or expert in Tencent Think Tank, NetEase Think Tank, Didi Strategy Research Institute, Alimama Marketing Institute, Letv Marketing Institute, Qihoo Marketing Institute, Storm Marketing Institute, Xiaomi Expert Group, Airmedia Think Tank, Institute of Panorama and other institutes, think tanks and institutions. He is a member or works as judge of several award institutions, including Effie China Effectiveness Award, Tiger Roar Award for Digital Marketing, Golden Mouse Award for Network Marketing, ECI National Digital Business Innovation Award, IAI International Advertising and Marketing Award, China College Students Advertising Competition, and National College Students Innovation, Creativity and Entrepreneurship Contest, etc. And he has been serving as a visiting professor at Peking University, Communication University of China, and other colleges and universities.
Currently, he is active in the information economy, big data application market, e- commerce market, Internet transformation of traditional enterprises and related fields.

Translation  

Qiji Ma - Think Tank Expert - Marketing Research Association  

of China  

Consultant of China Market Information Survey Association  

Serving as a consultant or expert in Tencent Think Tank, NetEase Think Tank, Didi Strategy Research Institute, Alimama Marketing Institute, Letv Marketing Institute, Qihoo Marketing Institute, Storm Marketing Institute, Xiaomi Expert Group, Airmedia Think Tank, Institute of Panorama and other institutes, think tanks and institutions. He is a member or works as judge of several award institutions, including Effie China Effectiveness Award, Tiger Roar Award for Digital Marketing, Golden Mouse Award for Network Marketing, ECI National Digital Business Innovation Award, IAI International Advertising and Marketing Award, China College Students Advertising Competition, and National College Students Innovation, Creativity and Entrepreneurship Contest, etc. And he has been serving as a visiting professor at Peking University, Communication University of China, and other colleges and universities.  

Currently, he is active in the information economy, big data application market, e- commerce market, Internet transformation of traditional enterprises and related fields.
